lastReleaseMessage: Hardening pass across api and web. Rules API rejects bad regex and inverted amount bounds, rule preview now agrees with apply (LIKE wildcards escaped), archived Plaid rows stay out of categorize and rules passes, budgets PUT enforces integer cents per D-003, analytics query params are clamped, and /api/stats collapsed to one query and now reports the archived count. Web: fully typed api client, dashboard tiles show an error with retry instead of a stuck skeleton when a fetch fails, month-switch race guard on the dashboard, date displays no longer shift a day across the UTC boundary, react-dom realigned to 18 after a bad dependabot pairing, react-router advisory cleared. Release tooling clears git locks only through the git-guard liveness check. 18 new tests.

barRaise.topFinding: Full pass on the v0.14.4 hardening release; health holds at 89 (working). All four hard rules verified live (D-006 loopback bind at server.ts:1256, D-003 integer cents, D-001 no importer outbound, D-004/D-007 backup-then-fail-503), pnpm audit clean at high+, and every version pill reads 0.14.4. The one substantive new gap: POST /api/transactions/bulk-delete (server.ts:534) permanently deletes rows with no pre-delete snapshot, the only user-facing destructive path that skips the createBackup step every other mutating route takes (two lenses flagged it MED). A second MED: scripts/push-to-github.ps1:28-31 still blind-deletes .git/index.lock before its Assert-GitSafe guard, the FUSE-corruption race v0.14.4 removed from release.ps1/preship.ps1 but missed here, and release.ps1 delegates its push to it. Also actionable: narrow the wildcard yesandeverything.com CORS grant to the GET probe route, and reconcile the Budget audit/resources Discord webhook wiring against the naming standard. Prior dependency-01 (cut v0.14.4) is closed; the security destructive-endpoint token-guard stays a deferred security-vs-solo-ux tradeoff, now 4 runs open.

actions.title: Add createBackup("pre-bulk-delete") + 503-on-fail to POST /api/transactions/bulk-delete (server.ts:534), the only destructive path skipping the snapshot every other mutating route takes.
Delete the blind Remove-Item .git\index.lock block in scripts/push-to-github.ps1:28-31 and rely on the already-present Assert-GitSafe guard.
Narrow the yesandeverything.com CORS grant (server.ts:90-99) off the wildcard /* to the GET probe route only.
Reconcile the Budget audit/resources Discord webhook wiring against the naming standard (fifth webhook file missing; post-audit-digests.ps1 posts to #budget-resources via the audit webhook).

deferred.title: Add a per-boot-token or Sec-Fetch-Site same-origin guard on the destructive loopback endpoints (Plaid takeover/restore, backup/import deletes).
deferred.reason: standing security-vs-solo-ux tradeoff awaiting Nick's friction-level call; tension 4 runs open
